reportedIssues: Navigation tab text 'Hot Gam' appears truncated and should read 'Hot Games'. The text is being cut off at the edge of the tab.

Game cards in both the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are horizontally cut off on the right side. The rightmost visible cards show partial content (e.g., 'MAGNI' instead of full game title, 'HYPERD' truncated).

expected.reasoning: No reported issue describes a Jackpots category being incorrectly highlighted; the reports only mention text truncation and card layout issues.
